name: Ninja Art: Flash Step
outcome: [AttackerName] crouches down with a cocky grin before suddenly disappearing in a puff of smoke, and before [TargetName] can realize what happened, [AttackerName] reappears behind [TargetHimOrHer] and sweeps [TargetHisOrHer] legs out from under [TargetHimOrHer], causing [TargetName] to fall onto [TargetHisOrHer] back!|n|[AttackerName] lets out a confident laugh as [AttackerHeOrShe] kicks off a sandal before pressing her stocking clad foot down onto [TargetName]’s groin, eliciting a whimper of pleasure from [TargetHimOrHer] as [AttackerHeOrShe] grinds [AttackerHimOrHer] heel against [TargetHisOrHer] groin!
miss: [AttackerName] crouches down with a cocky grin before suddenly disappearing in a puff of smoke, but as [AttackerHeOrShe] reappears behind [TargetName], [TargetHeOrShe] manages to sense her presence and twists away from [AttackerHimOrHer], avoiding [AttackerHimOrHer] sweeping leg!
